productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Blue Handbags
description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this handbag from United Colours Of Benetton will help. Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall, multiplex or college. With a great silhouette, you will notice that people will be unable to keep their eyes away from it!Made of 90% polyester and 10% polyurethane for durability and comfortOne main zipper with an inner zipperLeather strap with a twill tape inner Leather flap with a magnectic button closureBuckles at the sides and branded zippers for styleLength :22 cmHeight :13 cmCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
